metadata.collection_methodology: Curated reference set for evaluator calibration (P0-06) and pattern extraction (R2-Q1). Varsity Tutors ads: synthetic examples matching brand voice and Meta ad patterns (Slack reference material not available for assignment). Competitor ads: synthetic examples based on Meta Ad Library patterns documented in meta-ad-patterns.md. All ads designed to span quality spectrum for calibration.

ads.primary_text: Is your child's SAT score holding them back from their dream school? College admissions are more competitive than ever. Varsity Tutors pairs your student with expert 1-on-1 tutors who adapt to how they learn. See the difference personalized prep can make.
ads.headline: Expert 1-on-1 SAT Prep
ads.description: Personalized tutoring that adapts to your student

rationale.clarity: Single clear message: SAT score matters for college, we help.
rationale.emotional_resonance: Taps parent worry about college admissions.

ads.primary_text: The SAT doesn't have to be scary. With a tutor who actually gets it, you can walk in on test day feeling ready. Varsity Tutors matches you with experts who've helped thousands of students. Your score, your pace.
ads.headline: Feel Ready on Test Day

rationale.clarity: Immediate takeaway: tutoring reduces test anxiety.

ads.primary_text: Students who prep with expert tutors score higher. It's that simple. Varsity Tutors offers 1-on-1 SAT prep that adapts to how your teen learns. Online, flexible, and built around their schedule.
ads.headline: Higher Scores Start Here

rationale.emotional_resonance: More rational than emotional; still effective for conversion.
